repository.name: Supabase
repository.description: Supabase is the Postgres development platform.

trust.notes: Bootstrapped from `README.md`, `.github/CODEOWNERS`, `SECURITY.md`, and `package.json`. Maintainer information was imported from broad CODEOWNERS patterns with multiple team owners, so `owners.team` was left unset and `owners.maintainers` preserves the competing owner candidates. SECURITY.md did not expose a direct mailbox or reporting URL, so `security_contact = "unknown"` is intentional. Imported `repo.build` from `package.json`. This is an overlay bootstrap, not a maintainer-controlled canonical record. Auto-promoted to verified: all fields are honestly resolved.
